reference: Good day, sir. I am going for in vitro fertilization treatment next month, and my doctor prescribed me some pills this month along with injections so that my body can be ready for in vitro fertilization treatment. One of the tablets is Crisanta. Please advise me if I can have a normal pregnancy if I continue to take this pill, Crisanta, as my doctor advised I cannot have a normal pregnancy because of this pill. Regards, BH.
text: Thanks! And one for a computer, please. My doctor prescribed one injection, so I might be ready for a computer. What does that work with for him? He prescribed me like I have no offense to you. But he...
